title: Contract 4 — AI tool-call + receipt envelope
description: Wire shape for a tool call the brain emits and the receipt it gets back. ai-tools.ts is source of truth for the Node side. Tool VERBS are FREEZE-NOW; receipts for looper_state / write_movement / add_device are PROVISIONAL (see PROVISIONAL-SEAMS). Addresses use CellRef/ChainID/DeviceRole/SceneID only — never raw Live indices.

args.description: shape depends on tool; see ai-tools.ts AI_TOOLS[tool].params

confirmed.description: true only when the engine echoed the resulting state (Contract 12)

error.description: set when confirmed=false, e.g. timeout | rejected | not_supported

observed.description: observed-state fields; PROVISIONAL receipts carry a __provisional marker
